notes: C3157 Trace: 12th pause-map fix — sage was 'until_next_bolt_commit' but bolt_commit_cycle(3158) > paused_at_bolt_cycle(3155) so condition was already satisfied = sage would run. Root cause of 11 recurring wipes. All 3 now HARD PAUSED with 'paused'. Zero open tasks, 7 blocked on bectly. DEVLOOP MUST STOP.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit or until_lead_directive)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
